leadText: Play Nice (Japanese: なかよくする Make Friends) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Play Nice lowers the target's Attack stat by one stage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . It will hit the target even if it has used Protect , Detect , Spiky Shield , or Max Guard but will fail if the target is protected by Crafty Shield . Play Nice bypasses substitutes . If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Play Nice, the user's Defense stat rises by one stage. Play Nice can be used as a part of a Contest Spectacular combination , causing certain moves ( Circle Throw , Seismic Toss , Sky Drop , Smack Down , Storm Throw and Vital Throw ) to give an extra three appeal points if any of them is used in the next turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD MD RT DX It lowers the enemy's Attack.
